{{Infobox rugby league team season | year = 2000 | team_colour = red; border:solid blue 1px | font_colour = gold | league = Super League | league_link = [[Super League V]] | league_rank = 11th | league_wins = 6 | league_draws = 0 | league_losses = 22 | points_for = 521 | points_against = 810 | playoff_result = | cup = Challenge Cup | cup_result = Fifth round | cup_wins = 1 | cup_losses = 1 | CEO_title = Chairman | CEO = [[Richard Branson]] | coach_title = | coach = [[John Monie]] | captain = [[Karle Hammond]] | stadium = [[The Valley (London)|The Valley]] | avg_attendance = 3,354 | high_attendance = 8,067 | top_tries = [[Tulsen Tollett]] - 12 | top_goals = [[Brett Warton]] - 57 | top_points = Brett Warton - 150 | pattern_la1 = _darkyellowthickborder | pattern_b1 = _yellowblackyellowhorizontal | pattern_ra1 = _darkyellowthickborder | pattern_sh1 = _redsides | pattern_so1 = _whitetop | leftarm1 = ff0000 | body1 = ff0000 | rightarm1 = ff0000 | shorts1 = | socks1 = ff0000 | pattern_la2 = _redyellow | pattern_b2 = _whiteredwhite_hoops | pattern_ra2 = _redyellow | pattern_sh2 = _redsides | pattern_so2 = _whitetop | leftarm2 = 002387 | body2 = 002387 | rightarm2 = 002387 | shorts2 = | socks2 = 002366 | prev_season = [[1999 London Broncos season|1999]] | next_season = [[2001 London Broncos season|2001]] | list = yes | list_link = List of London Broncos seasons }} The '''2000 London Broncos season''' was the twenty-first in the club's history and their fifth season in the [[Super League]]. The club was coached by [[John Monie]], competing in [[Super League V]] and finishing in 11th place. The club also got to the fifth round of the [[2000 Challenge Cup|Challenge Cup]]. ==Super League V table== {{Super League V ladder|showteam=LON}} ==2000 Challenge Cup== {{main|2020 Challenge Cup}} The year after reaching their maiden Final, the [[London Broncos|Broncos]] were knocked out of the cup at the fifth round stage.[https://web.archive.org/web/20160621125537/http://rugby-league-world.com/2000/challcup/CupRound5e.html Rugby League Challenge Cup round 5] {{legend2|#CFC|Win|border=1px solid #000000|text=W}}
